evidencePolicy.impactProofRule: Use impact proof only when directly supported by the portfolio item, artifact, CV, or external feedback.
evidencePolicy.claimBoundary: Proof points describe artifact-visible work quality unless an item-level impact entry states a directly supported result.

Training Needs Analysis.visibleProofLine: Maps performance gaps into clear training priorities.

workQuality.claim: Connects audience needs, performance gaps, and design-ready training priorities.

Training Proposal.visibleProofLine: Turns learning needs into a structured delivery plan.

workQuality.claim: Defines objectives, program logic, delivery structure, and stakeholder-ready recommendations.

Instructional Design.visibleProofLine: Aligns objectives, activities, practice, and evidence.

workQuality.claim: Structures learning objectives, session flow, learner activities, practice tasks, and evidence of competency.

Curriculum Development.visibleProofLine: Maps competencies into a usable learning sequence.

workQuality.claim: Organizes competencies, learning sequence, program structure, and evidence requirements into a usable curriculum asset.

Learning Materials.visibleProofLine: Converts concepts into facilitator-ready learning material.

workQuality.claim: Turns learning content into structured explanations, activities, examples, and learner prompts.

Assessment & Evaluation.visibleProofLine: Links measurement tools to learning outcomes.

workQuality.claim: Uses assessment, evaluation, rubric, or scoring structures to make learning evidence easier to collect and review.

Learning Analytics.visibleProofLine: Turns learning data into decision-ready analysis.

workQuality.claim: Structures learning data, response inputs, or calculations into analysis-ready dashboards and decision tools.

L&D Strategy.visibleProofLine: Connects capability priorities with actionable learning strategy.

workQuality.claim: Frames learning products, business goals, capability priorities, and growth logic into an actionable L&D plan.
Uses mentoring activities, reflection prompts, and action planning tools to support learner follow-through.

Presentation Design.visibleProofLine: Organizes complex ideas into a clear slide narrative.

workQuality.claim: Shapes complex ideas into a presentation-ready narrative, evidence structure, and visual communication flow.

Custom Training & Workshops.visibleProofLine: Builds applied workshop flow around practice tasks.

workQuality.claim: Combines facilitation structure, participant activities, and practical implementation support.

Review: Legacy Project.visibleProofLine: Shows applied program, people, or operations capability.

workQuality.claim: Demonstrates earlier applied program, people, or learning operations capability through a portfolio artifact.

Mentoring & Speaking.visibleProofLine: Builds confidence, communication, or professional influence.

workQuality.claim: Uses speaking or mentoring material to support confidence, communication, storytelling, or professional influence.

case-administrative-communication-learni.visibleProofLine: Maps 36 learning hours into sessions, OJT, and competency evidence.

workQuality.claim: Maps 36 learning hours into session structure, activities, OJT practice, and competency evidence.
Assesses workplace behavior transfer through observable communication tasks and structured rubrics.

case-learning-organization-strategy-eval.visibleProofLine: Synthesizes labor-market signals into training priorities.

workQuality.claim: Synthesizes labor-market signals into practical training priorities for future-ready workplace skills.

project-entrepreneurship-program-for-500.visibleProofLine: Adapts entrepreneurship learning for a 5000+ student audience.

workQuality.claim: Structures entrepreneurship learning for a large vocational student audience.

impact.claim: The portfolio description identifies a 5000+ SMK student audience.

project-3rd-winner-in-kumpul-jasa-jember.visibleProofLine: Competition result gives directly supported external recognition.

workQuality.claim: Shows applied entrepreneurship and presentation capability through a competition portfolio item.

impact.claim: The portfolio title states a 3rd winner result in KUMPUL JASA Jember Entrepreneurship Competition.

project-self-leadership-career-transitio.visibleProofLine: Structures 52 slides around reflection, practical frameworks, quizzes, and action planning.

workQuality.claim: Organizes career transition, self-leadership, professional identity, and emotional resilience into a 52-slide facilitated learning sequence.

case-employee-assessment-bootcamp.visibleProofLine: Connects observation evidence and scoring to a redacted individual report.

workQuality.claim: Links competency mapping, activity-specific observation, scoring, calibration, consolidation, and participant-facing reporting.

project-score-audit-corrections.visibleProofLine: Summarizes 1,173 Manual Review correction rows across 13 Kelompok files.

workQuality.claim: Documents score corrections by source file, sheet, changed field, original value, revised value, rule, evidence note, reason, and confidence.
Uses a redacted HTML viewer for public review instead of exposing the raw Awardee-level workbook as a shipped artifact.

impact.claim: The source workbook records 1,173 correction rows across 13 Kelompok files.
